title: [codereview-P4] spec/04-network.md short address human-readable section at line 61 should cross-ref to new 12.3 and 02-physical-link.md:215 for consistency
description: The earlier mention of human-readable short address (Crockford Base32 of IID) at top of 6.2 does not reference the assignment details or hash_32. Minor but for full consistency after this update. Tagged codereview. This is pass 2 of 3.
close_reason: Fixed in subsequent edits to 04-network.md; references now precise and consistent. Part of 3 codereview passes for project-LICHEN-vfl0
